title: Terms of Service
intro: These Terms govern the use of the social-media-v1 service. By registering and using the service you accept these Terms in full.

sections.heading: 1. Definitions
body: “Service” — the social-media-v1 software product available via the website and API.
“User” — an individual or legal entity using the Service under these Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Subject
body: The Provider grants the User access to the Service's social media management features powered by AI agents, under the selected plan.
The feature set of each plan is listed on the pricing page and may change with prior notice.

sections.heading: 3. Registration and account
body: Using the Service requires creating an account and verifying the email address.
The User is responsible for keeping credentials safe and for all actions performed with their account.

sections.heading: 4. Payment
body: Paid plans are provided on a subscription basis. The trial period is provided without a card.
Refunds are handled per the refund section and applicable law.

sections.heading: 5. Liability
body: The Service is provided “as is”. The Provider makes reasonable efforts to keep it available but does not guarantee uninterrupted operation.
The User is solely responsible for content published through the Service and for complying with the rules of the social networks used.
